name: Gunn v. University Comm. to End War in Viet Nam
question: Does the Three-Judge Court Act allow direct appeals to the Supreme Court of the United States when the a district court does not specifically grant or deny an injunction?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Three-Judge Court Act does not allow direct appeals to the Supreme Court of the United States when the a district court does not specifically grant or deny an injunction.
